chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-4403 of 2024 (Saifullah Katohar Baloch and another v. Province of Sindh and others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURES OF JUDGES For hearing of main case 16.10.2024 Mr. Asadullah Ghumro, advocate for the petitioners M/s. Rajesh Kumar Khagaija and Sandeep Kumar, advocates for the respondent No.2 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, AAG --------- By way of the instant petition, the petitioners have sought a direction against the respondents to provide the books of the syllabus to poor students all over the Province. On the last date of the hearing, the petitioners were directed by this Court to provide details of the schools wherein the books/syllabus had not been provided to the students, which they have failed to furnish. It is stated by learned AAG and counsel for the respondents that the instant petition has been filed by the petitioners only for publicity purpose. Be that as it may, no particular instance has been cited/quoted by the petitioners which may suggest that the books/syllabus has not been provided to the students in any of the school all over the Province which may compel this Court to issue such directions. The petition being vague is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir/PA*
